Policy says maximum_days: 120. Computed: 120 * 86400 = 10368000 seconds
Matches policy document in setup_task.sh (line 159). Confirmed camera exists in live environment
Policy says mode "continuous" for Restricted business hours, maps to API "always"
Policy document says frame_rate: 10 for Restricted business hours
Policy document says quality: "normal" for Restricted business hours
Policy says mode "continuous" for Restricted off-hours, maps to API "always". NOTE: This is the INVERTED zone — higher quality/fps during off-hours than business hours
Policy document says frame_rate: 15 for Restricted off-hours. INVERTED: higher fps after hours than during business hours (15 vs 10)
Policy document says quality: "high" for Restricted off-hours. INVERTED: higher quality after hours (high vs normal)
Policy says minimum_days: 180. Computed: 180 * 86400 = 15552000 seconds
Policy says maximum_days: 365. Computed: 365 * 86400 = 31536000 seconds

Verified in task_utils.sh refresh_nx_token function. Also works with /rest/v2/login/sessions. Confirmed via live API calls during testing
Verified in setup_task.sh lines 63, 76, 85 which use nx_api_patch on /rest/v1/devices/{id}. Also confirmed by existing task setup scripts (recording_compliance_audit, configure_holiday_schedules)

pi_items.metadata_value: PATCH with minArchivePeriodS and maxArchivePeriodS fields
pi_items.source: Setup_task.sh lines 92-98 use v2 API for retention. The v1 API also supports these fields on the device object directly. Existing configure_retention_policy verifier checks these fields. Confirmed by Network Optix API documentation

privileged_info_summary: The Nx Witness VMS at https://localhost:7001 uses REST API v1 with Bearer token authentication via POST /rest/v1/login/sessions (username: admin, password: Admin1234!). Three virtual test cameras are configured: Parking Lot Camera (Perimeter zone), Entrance Camera (Access Point zone), and Server Room Camera (Restricted zone). The policy document at /home/ga/Documents/recording_policy.json uses human-readable terms that must be translated to API values: 'continuous' maps to recordingType 'always', 'motion_triggered' maps to 'motionOnly'. Business hours are Mon-Fri 07:00-19:00 (startTime: 25200, endTime: 68400 seconds). Off-hours (19:00-07:00) must be split into TWO schedule entries per day due to midnight wraparound: evening segment (startTime: 68400, endTime: 86400) and morning segment (startTime: 0, endTime: 25200). Weekends (dayOfWeek 6=Sat, 7=Sun) use all-day off-hours config (startTime: 0, endTime: 86400). Each weekday needs 3 task entries, each weekend day needs 1, totaling 17 entries per camera (51 total). Perimeter zone: business=always/15fps/high, off-hours=always/10fps/normal, retention 90-180 days (minArchivePeriodS: 7776000, maxArchivePeriodS: 15552000). Access Point zone: business=always/15fps/high, off-hours=always/5fps/low, retention 60-120 days (minArchivePeriodS: 5184000, maxArchivePeriodS: 10368000). Restricted zone has INVERTED quality: business=always/10fps/normal, off-hours=always/15fps/high (higher quality when area should be unoccupied), retention 180-365 days (minArchivePeriodS: 15552000, maxArchivePeriodS: 31536000). Schedule PATCH payload: {"schedule": {"isEnabled": true, "tasks": [{"dayOfWeek": N, "startTime": S, "endTime": E, "recordingType": "always", "fps": F, "streamQuality": Q, "bitrateKbps": 0, "metadataTypes": "none"}]}}. Retention set via PATCH on same device endpoint using minArchivePeriodS and maxArchivePeriodS fields. Agent must generate verification report at /home/ga/Documents/schedule_audit.json.
